parameters.jsCode:
// n8n Code node — "Build Emails" // Place AFTER "Parse Script" node // Outputs TWO items: [0] = customer email, [1] = admin email // Then use a Send Email node for each (or split with IF) const order = $('Validate and Transform Order').first().json.order; const script = $('Parse Script').first().json.script; const scriptVersion = $('Parse Script').first().json.version || 1; // ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── // Env flags // ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── const env = $('Envs').first().json.env; const approvalRequired = env.script_approval_required === true || env.script_approval_required === 'true'; const REVIEW_BASE = `https://evermagic.app.n8n.cloud/webhook${env.is_live ? '' : '-test'}/evermagic/review`; // ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── // 1. Customer Confirmation Email // ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── const packageLabels = { 'BASIC': 'Basic (Storybook + Coloring + Certificate)', 'FULL': 'Full Bundle (Video + PDF + printable)', 'PARTY': 'Party Pack', }; const themeLabels = { 'SPACE_HERO': 'Space Hero Mission', }; const customerHtml = `
✨

Your Magic Is Being Created!

Hi there! 👋

We've received your order and our magic machines are already working on ${order.child.name}'s personalized adventure!

Order Details
Order No. ${order.order_id}
Hero ${order.child.name}, age ${order.child.age}
Package ${packageLabels[order.package] || order.package}
Theme ${themeLabels[order.theme] || order.theme}
Estimated Delivery
⏱ ~15 minutes
We'll email you when it's ready!

Sit back and relax — the magic is happening! 🚀

Made with ❤️ by EverMagic

`; // ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── // 2. Admin Review Email // ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── const scenesHtml = script.scenes.map(s => `
Scene ${s.scene_number} · ${s.emotion || ''}

${s.scene_title}

${s.narration}

🎬 Visual: ${s.visual_description}
`).join('\n'); const adminHtml = `
${scenesHtml} ${approvalRequired ? ` ` : ` `}
⚡ EverMagic Admin

${approvalRequired ? 'Script Ready for Review' : 'Script Auto-Approved'}

 ${approvalRequired ? `Needs Review` : `Auto-Approved ✅` }
Order ${order.order_id} Package ${packageLabels[order.package] || order.package}
Hero ${order.child.name} (${order.child.age}) Theme ${themeLabels[order.theme] || order.theme}
Trait ${order.child.hero_trait} Language ${order.language}

📖 ${script.title}

${script.tagline}

v${scriptVersion}
💚 Parent's Message
${order.parent_message || 'No message provided.'}
✅ Approve 🔄 Edit & Retry ✏️ Manual Edit

Click an action above to approve, retry with AI, or manually edit this script.

🤖
Script was auto-approved
Image generation has already started. No action needed.

This is an FYI notification. Script approval is currently disabled.

`; // ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── // 3. Output both emails as two items // ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── return [ { json: { email_type: 'customer_confirmation', to: order.delivery.email, subject: `✨ Your magic is being created, ${order.child.name}!`, html: customerHtml, order_id: order.order_id } }, { json: { email_type: 'admin_review', to: 'taras.evermagic@gmail.com', subject: `📋 Script Review — ${order.order_id} — ${order.child.name}`, html: adminHtml, order_id: order.order_id } } ];
